```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.8em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.14em;text-transform:uppercase;">stage</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:1.4em;font-weight:900;color:#2C8475;line-height:1;">01</span>
  <span style="font-size:0.85em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;">Add a verifier</span>
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#3DA18A;background:#E5F2EE;padding:0.2em 0.55em;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #B0D9C9;letter-spacing:0.06em;text-transform:uppercase;">cheapest upgrade</span>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0.6em;border-radius:14px;overflow:hidden;background:#1E1E2E;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(0,0,0,0.2);text-align:left;font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.55em;line-height:1.6;">

  <div style="padding:0.85em 1em;border-right:1px solid rgba(248,247,240,0.15);">
   <div style="color:#FFB84D;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:0.85em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">› Session A · Writer</div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">implement feature X</div>
   <div style="color:#9B8EA0;">writes code, commits</div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">…waits for review…</div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">address feedback</div>
  </div>

  <div style="padding:0.85em 1em;background:rgba(86,84,162,0.1);">
   <div style="color:#3DA18A;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.08em;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:0.85em;margin-bottom:0.4em;">› Session B · Reviewer</div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">…waits…</div>
   <div style="color:#F8F7F0;">review <span style="color:#69B4F0;">@src/...</span></div>
   <div style="color:#9B8EA0;">edge cases · races</div>
   <div style="color:#5C6B80;">…waits…</div>
  </div>

 </div>

 <div style="margin-top:0.8em;background:#F4F2FB;border-left:4px solid #5654A2;border-radius:0 10px 10px 0;padding:0.65em 1em;font-size:0.62em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.45;text-align:left;">
  Not a "harness" yet. You decoupled <strong style="color:#5654A2;">generation from evaluation</strong> — that's <strong style="color:#C4881A;">most of the win</strong>.
 </div>

</div>
```
